{{Quote|Life in the RSF is everything I dreamed it would be, though the Violent Crimes Division is often difficult to stomach.|Sundria Khartoor, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:RtLSK" />}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Sundria Khartoor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Near-Human]] working for the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Guard]] as a violent crimes officer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:RtLSK" />

==Biography==
{{Quote|Report to Lieutenant Sundria Khartoor of the RSF violent Crimes Division for more details.|[[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja Naberrie]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:RtLSK" />}}
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Sundria Khartoor was in charge of the hunt for the escaped murderer [[Hunnos Jarkey]].<ref name="SWG:FaEM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Find an Escaped Murderer|Naboo}}</ref> She employed RSF agents who had previously worked under [[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja Naberrie]], and had recently carried out a successful [[Rescue of Karl Eckener|rescue mission]].<ref name="SWG:RKE">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Rescue Karl Eckner|Naboo}}</ref> She tasked them first to investigate the criminals known as the [[Peddlers]], then [[Nal Raka Criminal Empire|Borvo's thug]] [[Derm Worrit]], and finally [[Ados Jarkey|Jarkey's father]] himself.<ref name="SWG:FaEM" /> They then found that Jarkey briefly took refuge among different criminal organization, namely the [[Muskegs]], the [[Skaak Tippers]] and the [[Mummers]].<ref name="SWG:CaEM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "Chase an Escaped Murderer" on Naboo</ref> The spacers eventually discovered that Jarkey had recruited a small army of [[Naboo pirates]] and fortified a [[Hunnos Jarkey's Ranch|ranch]] near [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. Lieutenant Sundria Khartoor planned the assault in which Hunnos Jarkey and all pirates were finally killed.<ref name="SWG:CtEM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Catch the Escaped Murderer|Naboo}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Sundria Khartoor appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:RtLSK" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Sundria Khartoor was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
